# NEURON Tasks — llms.txt
# AI/LLM Indexing Manifest
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
# Developer: Musab Hassen | https://themusab.tech

## About This Application

NEURON Tasks is a futuristic, AI-powered task management web application with a
cyberpunk aesthetic. It is a full-stack application built with React (frontend)
and Node.js + Express + MongoDB (backend). Users can create, organize, and track
tasks with the help of an integrated AI assistant, calendar views, and neural
productivity optimizations.

## Key Features

- AI-assisted natural language task creation
- Cyberpunk / neural dark-mode interface with neon green aesthetics
- Dual theme: professional light mode and futuristic dark mode
- Calendar view for visual task scheduling
- User authentication with JWT tokens
- Profile system with stats and achievements
- Animated particle background with neural-network connections
- Fully responsive across devices

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: React 18, Vite 5, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Zustand, React Router
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Mongoose, JWT, bcryptjs, Helmet
- Deployment: Vercel (frontend), Railway/Render (backend), MongoDB Atlas (DB)

## Developer

## Sitemap

- /           → Landing / Dashboard

- /register   → New User Registration
- /dashboard  → Main Task Dashboard
- /calendar   → Calendar View
- /profile    → User Profile
- /settings   → Application Settings
